Package org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.healthinsurance

Class InsurancePlan

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.healthinsurance.InsurancePlan
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class InsurancePlan extends Object implements Serializable
A class that defines an insurance plan.
See Also:

  • Field Details

    • id

      public final int id
      Unique identifier for the insurance plan.

  • Constructor Details

    • InsurancePlan

      public InsurancePlan(int id, Payer payer, Set<String> servicesCovered, BigDecimal deductible, BigDecimal defaultCoinsurance, BigDecimal defaultCopay, BigDecimal monthlyPremium, BigDecimal maxOutOfPocket, boolean medicareSupplement, boolean isACA, boolean incomeBasedPremium, int activeYearStart, int activeYearEnd, int priority, String eligibilityName)
      Constructor for InsurancePlan.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique identifier for the plan.
      payer - The payer associated with the plan.
      servicesCovered - The set of services covered by the plan.
      deductible - The deductible.
      defaultCoinsurance - The default coinsurance.
      defaultCopay - The default copay.
      monthlyPremium - The monthly premium.
      maxOutOfPocket - Max yearly out of pocket cost to patient.
      medicareSupplement - If this is a medicare supplement plan.
      isACA - If this is an Affordable Care Act plan.
      incomeBasedPremium - If this plan has an income-based percentage premium.
      activeYearStart - The first year the plan is available.
      activeYearEnd - The last year the plan is available.
      priority - The priority of this plan for patients to choose it.
      eligibilityName - The eligibility algorithm to use.

  • Method Details

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive(long time)
      Returns whether this plan is active at the given time.
      Parameters:
      time - The time to check if the plan is active at.
      Returns:
      whether this plan is active at the given time.

    • determineCopay

      public BigDecimal determineCopay(String entryType, long entryStart)
      Determines the copay owed for this Payer based on the type of entry. For now, this returns a default copay. But in the future there will be different copays depending on the encounter type covered. If the entry is a wellness visit and the time is after the mandate year, then the copay is $0.00.
      Parameters:
      entryType - the entry type to calculate the copay for.
      entryStart - The start time of the entry.
      Returns:
      the copay amount for the entry type.

    • getMonthlyPremium

      public BigDecimal getMonthlyPremium(int income)
      Returns the monthly premium for this plan. If this is an income based premium, it will use the income to calculate what the monthly premium should be.
      Parameters:
      income - the income to base income-based premiums on.
      Returns:
      the monthly premium amount.

    • getDeductible

      public BigDecimal getDeductible()
      Returns the deductible amount for this plan.
      Returns:
      The deductible amount.

    • getPayerCoinsurance

      public BigDecimal getPayerCoinsurance()
      Returns the payer's coinsurance rate for this plan.
      Returns:
      The payer's coinsurance rate.

    • getPatientCoinsurance

      public BigDecimal getPatientCoinsurance()
      Returns the patient's coinsurance rate for this plan.
      Returns:
      The patient's coinsurance rate.

    • payMonthlyPremium

      public BigDecimal payMonthlyPremium(double employerLevel, int income)
      Pays the plan's premium to the Payer, increasing their revenue.
      Parameters:
      employerLevel - Number that represents whether an employer will contribute towards the premium.
      income - The income of the person.
      Returns:
      the monthly premium amount.

    • getPayer

      public Payer getPayer()
      Returns the payer associated with this insurance plan.
      Returns:
      The payer.

    • getInsuranceStatus

      public String getInsuranceStatus()
      Returns the insurance status type of this plan.
      Returns:
      The insurance status.

    • incrementCustomers

      public void incrementCustomers(String personId)
      Increments the number of customers that have used this plan's payers.
      Parameters:
      personId - The person Id for whom to increment.

    • incrementCoveredEntries

      public void incrementCoveredEntries(HealthRecord.Entry entry)
      Increments the number of covered entries.
      Parameters:
      entry - The covered entry.

    • incrementUncoveredEntries

      public void incrementUncoveredEntries(HealthRecord.Entry entry)
      Increments the number of uncovered entries.
      Parameters:
      entry - The uncovered entry.

    • coversService

      public boolean coversService(HealthRecord.Entry entry)
      Determines whether this plan covers the given service type.
      Parameters:
      entry - The entry to cover.
      Returns:
      Whether this plan covers the given service type.

    • addCoveredCost

      protected void addCoveredCost(BigDecimal coveredCosts)
      Adds a covered cost to this plan.
      Parameters:
      coveredCosts - The cost covered.

    • addUncoveredCost

      protected void addUncoveredCost(BigDecimal uncoveredCosts)
      Adds an uncovered cost to this plan.
      Parameters:
      uncoveredCosts - The cost covered.

    • adjustClaim

      public BigDecimal adjustClaim(Claim.ClaimEntry claimEntry, Person person)
      Determines whether or not this payer will adjust this claim, and by how much. This determination is based on the claim adjustment strategy configuration, which defaults to none.
      Parameters:
      claimEntry - The claim entry to be adjusted.
      person - The person making the claim.
      Returns:
      The dollar amount the claim entry was adjusted.

    • getYearlyCost

      public BigDecimal getYearlyCost(int income)
      Returns the yearly cost of this plan.
      Parameters:
      income - The income of the individual.
      Returns:
      The yearly cost of the plan.

    • accepts

      public boolean accepts(Person person, long time)
      Returns whether a plan will accept the given patient at this time using the plan eligibility criteria.
      Parameters:
      person - Person to consider
      time - Time the person seeks care
      Returns:
      whether or not the payer will accept this patient as a customer

    • isNoInsurance

      public boolean isNoInsurance()
      Returns whether this plan is based on the no insurance payer.
      Returns:
      True if this plan is based on the no insurance payer, false otherwise.

    • isGovernmentPlan

      public boolean isGovernmentPlan()
      Returns whether this is a government plan.
      Returns:
      whether this is a government plan.

    • mayPurchaseSupplement

      public boolean mayPurchaseSupplement()
      Returns whether a customer may buy a supplement to this plan.
      Returns:
      Whether a person may buy a supplement plan.

    • isMedicareSupplementPlan

      public boolean isMedicareSupplementPlan()
      Returns whether this plans is a medicare supplement plan.
      Returns:
      True if the plan is a Medicare Supplement Plan, false otherwise.

    • getPriority

      public int getPriority()
      Returns the priority level of this plan.
      Returns:
      The priority level of the plan.

    • isCopayBased

      public boolean isCopayBased()
      Returns whether this plan is copay-based.
      Returns:
      whether this is a copay-based plan.

    • getMaxOop

      public BigDecimal getMaxOop()
      Returns the maximum out-of-pocket cost for this plan.
      Returns:
      The maximum out-of-pocket cost.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
